case_title: BALDINA, SOFIA et al VS DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY BALDINA, SOFIA BALDIN, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT BALDINA, SOFIA BALDIN, STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-19-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-30-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE CONTINUED, TO BE HEARD WITH CASE NO. 789612.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALDINA, SOFIA BALDIN, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,100.00, CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE #789612 FOR PURPOSES OF TRIAL AND JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO.
CERT MAIL OF PLTF CLAIM SENT TO AGENT FOR SERVICE DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO RETURNED-- UNCLAIMED
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-19-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-29-2001 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BALDINA, SOFIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF BALDIN, STEVEN
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF APR-30-2001, GRANTED CONTINUED FROM APR-30-2001 TO APR-30-2001 AT 01:30 PM
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,148.18 AS TO DEFENDANT DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT RECEIVED; REFERRED TO PRESIDING JUDGE FOR RULING
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO.
DEFT'S DECL:PLTFF NOT SRVD;INCREASE CLAIM AMT.FROM $4500 TO $5000.
MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-01-789612 WITH CASE CSM-00-788440 HEARING SET FOR APR-30-2001 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT DONLEY'S ABLE HOME RESTORATION CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BALDINA, SOFIA BALDIN, STEVEN CONSOLIDATED WITH CASE #789612 FOR PURPOSES OF TRIAL AND JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
